rulings.Case Title: ALFONSO HARO VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn To Postponse A Non Judicial Foreclosure
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 13, 2012, line 1. Plaintiff Alfonso Haro's motion to postpone a non judicial foreclosure. Grant. Opposing party failed to provide completed evidence. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AURORA LOAN SERVICES LLC VS. JOSE CARLOS HERNANDEZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted; And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 13, 2012, line 8. Plaintiff Aurora Loan Services LLC's MOTION FOR ORDER THAT MATTERS IN REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS as to Mario Pizarro BE DEEMED ADMITTED; AND REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS Grant subject to opposition. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AURORA LOAN SERVICES LLC VS. JOSE CARLOS HERNANDEZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion To Compel Defendant To Provide Responses To Demand For Inspection Of Documents (Set One) And To Produce All Responsive Documents; And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 13, 2012, line 8. Plaintiff Aurora Loan Services LLC.'s motion to compel defendant Antonio Reategui to provide responses to demand for inspection of documents (Set one) and to produce all responsive documents; and request for monetary sanctions. Grant Subject to opposition. Monetary sanctions $300. (501/REQ)
